query_normalized: comparative analysis of molecular fingerprints for pesticide toxicity prediction chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) because it explicitly investigates Morgan fingerprints as a baseline for molecular property prediction and compares their effectiveness against graph-based representations, directly addressing the user's need to evaluate molecular fingerprints for toxicity prediction tasks. Although the paper focuses on in-context learning retrieval rather than a direct toxicity regression model, it provides essential comparative evidence on the limitations and utility
